item.label: [PKT-LFC-002](task-0046): Lifecycle Manifest and Checkpoint Writer
item.summary: Create lifecycle manifest and checkpoint writer

body:
# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-LFC-002](task-0036): Lifecycle Manifest and Checkpoint Writer

## Purpose

Create lifecycle manifest and checkpoint writer.

## Scope

- Manifest format
- Checkpoint writing
- Version tracking

## Implementation

1. Define manifest format
2. Implement writer
3. Add version tracking

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Manifest written correctly
2. Checkpoints deterministic
3. Version tracked
